Video.summary: Detailing a dress with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress
The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: Let's create long from art foamies in this Art Foamies 101 class! Craft Kathy Cano-Murillo!
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Art Foamies 101

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Art Foamies 101
The Crafty Chica: Art Foamies 101

Video.summary: Washi Tape Cards with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape Cards

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape Cards
The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape Cards

Video.summary: What's up guys! In this Frog Food i'm redrawing my old art from when I was 5 years old!! I know right, it's been a long time. Check out how far i've come in an ALL NEW Frog Food
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Re-Drawing My Old Art From When I Was 5 Years Old!

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Re-Drawing My Old Art From When I Was 5 Years Old!
Digital Painting - Frog Food: Re-Drawing My Old Art From When I Was 5 Years Old!

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we celebrate Strawberry season with a healthy treat from healthy Chef and Partyologist Nancy Waldeck.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Video.summary: Learn how to make a cool 80s ribbon barrette!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: 80s DIY Ribbon Barrette

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: 80s DIY Ribbon Barrette
FaveCrafts: 80s DIY Ribbon Barrette

Video.summary: Learn to crochet with Marcy and our special guest Al Paca!
Video.title: The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca

Image.alt: The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca
The Art of Crochet for Kids: Learn to Crochet Al Paca

Video.summary: A handy and safe way to organize kitchen knifes inside a drawer.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: In-Drawer Knife Block

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: In-Drawer Knife Block
The Wood Whisperer: In-Drawer Knife Block

Video.summary: Krylon recently released a line of exterior wood stains in spray form. A very convenient way to transfer color to your outdoor projects! I sprayed 6 different test boards (maple and white oak) just to see how well the stain applies.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain
The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Video.summary: Marking lines on dark wood can be difficult to see. Here are some options to consider.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Marking on Dark Wood

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Marking on Dark Wood
The Wood Whisperer: Marking on Dark Wood

Video.summary: Looking to increase the safety and performance of your table saw? You have to try some of these upgrades!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: 7 Must-Have Table Saw Upgrades

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: 7 Must-Have Table Saw Upgrades
The Wood Whisperer: 7 Must-Have Table Saw Upgrades

Video.summary: In this David Marks Gallery Tour, you’ll see David’s wood boiling apparatus and his art gallery. David recently added an additional two-story building to his property and dedicated it to displaying his various turnings and furniture pieces all for the enjoyment of his students, visitors, and guests. The gallery contains many beautiful pieces by David as well as other amazing woodworkers.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Gallery Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Gallery Tour
The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Gallery Tour

Video.summary: We're working exclusively with American Green Lights who designed and supplied our lighting solution. The fixtures are PerformaLUX SL Series in both single strip 24 W models and 5-strip 60 W models. These units can save 50-60% compared to traditional fluorescent lights, have a lifetime of 120,000 hours, and feature a CRI of 92-95 (for color accuracy).
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Installing LED Shop Lighting

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Installing LED Shop Lighting
The Wood Whisperer: Installing LED Shop Lighting

Video.summary: Community shop tours that will have you drooling.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: I Could Do That Too If I Had Those Tools! - Shop Tours

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: I Could Do That Too If I Had Those Tools! - Shop Tours
The Wood Whisperer: I Could Do That Too If I Had Those Tools! - Shop Tours

Video.summary: The rails require tenons and some clever hardware solutions!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Rails

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Rails
The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - The Rails

Video.summary: The GRR-Ripper is an ingenious safety device from the folks at MicroJig. Most power tools can injure you in two primary ways: kickback or blade/bit contact. The GRR-Ripper protects you from both types of injury. It not only allows you to have better control of the workpiece, it also protects your hands should disaster strike.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: MicroJig GRR-Ripper

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: MicroJig GRR-Ripper
The Wood Whisperer: MicroJig GRR-Ripper

Video.summary: This mini covers the process of sawing off a box top. The idea is that this keepsake box will travel the country to different woodworkers’ shops, and each person will work on one part of the project.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sawing off a Box Top

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Sawing off a Box Top
The Wood Whisperer: Sawing off a Box Top

Video.summary: In this special, Marc goes to one of the best wood working shows in Arizona.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 1

Video.summary: Our annual holiday gift guide with some of our favorite woodworking gifts.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: 2018 Holiday Gift Guide

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: 2018 Holiday Gift Guide
The Wood Whisperer: 2018 Holiday Gift Guide

Video.summary: Build a miniature trebuchet and sling some crap around!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Mini Trebuchet

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Mini Trebuchet
The Wood Whisperer: Mini Trebuchet

Video.summary: Rick continues on his journey into the world of guitar-building. He takes us through adding kerfing, inlaying the tail wedge, installation of the binding, and construction of the back, the soundboard, the fretboard, and the bridge. We’ll also see how Rick handles a few errors he made along the way. One error is so big, the fate of the entire project hangs in the balance!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 2

Video.summary: A fun design experiment involving bent wood strips.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Artsy Fan C-Table - A Fun Experiment!

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Artsy Fan C-Table - A Fun Experiment!
The Wood Whisperer: Artsy Fan C-Table - A Fun Experiment!

Video.summary: There is something that has become abundantly clear since having a kid: we make a lot more laundry! Nicole specifically requested something on wheels with double capacity and this is what I came up with. We cut the domino joinery, grooves and panels and do a proof of concept for the woven panels.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Woven Panel Rolling Hamper Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Woven Panel Rolling Hamper Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: Woven Panel Rolling Hamper Part 1

Video.summary: Oil-based finishes are typically the first type of finish we confront as woodworkers, be it straight oil or a can polyurethane. Although they are all derived from oil, these finishes can vary widely in terms of application method, durability, and maintenance. The key to understanding these finishes is to understand their ingredients.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Oil-Based Finish Basics

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Oil-Based Finish Basics
The Wood Whisperer: Oil-Based Finish Basics

Video.summary: The sitting bench step stool comes to life with some additional shaping and assembly. The center support is joined to the legs using either wooden or brass dowels.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: Sitting Bench Step Stool Part 2

Video.summary: This is just a quick (silly) video of me assembling an Eagle America coping sled. I find this type of sled is not only helpful, but a necessity, when making frames and raised panel doors. It’s a great jig for running those narrow pieces through a big router bit.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana
The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. Today we take a walk on the wild side with a craft inspired by American writer and illustrator Maurice Sendak's 1963 children's book, "Where the Wild Things Are."
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are adding a pop of color to our spring crafts.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: It's All About Color

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: It's All About Color
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: It's All About Color

Video.summary: This cute Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor is an excellent, customizable DIY favor for just about any occasion. Fill the tiny drawer with candy and leave them on tables as a DIY wedding favor, or fill them with kind notes and hand out to your friends the next time you host girls' night. No matter what you use it for, this free paper craft idea is a great little project! Check out this video tutorial to learn how to make them.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor
FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor
